case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. GOLDEN GATE RIDES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE RIDES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIALIBILITY COMPANY AND DOING BUSINESS AS GOLDEN GATE RIDES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE RIDES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIALIBILITY COMPANY AND DOING BUSINESS AS GOLDEN GATE RIDES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 609 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75054167)
